title: Smoky Hash and Charred Tomato Bake
description: A hearty and flavorful bake combining smoky hash, charred tomatoes, and a hint of norwegian flair.
instructions: Char the tomatoes by placing them directly on the oven rack for 10-12 minutes, or until slightly blackened.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the hash and cook until crispy, stirring occasionally.
In a separate bowl, combine the cooked hash and charred tomatoes.
Add the datterini tomatoes to the bowl and toss to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
